modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error converting Cognos report to Microsoft Excel

full_description_text: A field technician encountered an error while attempting to convert a Cognos report into Microsoft Excel. The error message indicated that the request was invalid and suggested contacting an administrator for assistance. Additionally, there was a secondary error stating that the requested session did not exist, further complicating the issue.
short_description: Error converting Cognos report to Microsoft Excel
description: A field technician encountered an error while attempting to convert a Cognos report into Microsoft Excel. The error message indicated that the request was invalid and suggested contacting an administrator for assistance. Additionally, there was a secondary error stating that the requested session did not exist, further complicating the issue.
